title: Trade ideas from "Energy, Utilities, Industrials, IT" Strategy
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey guys, happy Monday! Today my ["Energy, Utilities, Industrials, IT "](https://builder.limex.com/demo-portfolio/103963) Strategy highlighted 7 stocks as trade ideas. As you can see it removed almost all stocks from [previous week's](https://www.reddit.com/r/ai_trading/comments/1t4lizg/trade_ideas_for_this_week/) list except AVT.

|Company|Why Picked|Entry Target|Exit (Profit)|Stop Loss|Growth Reasoning|Specific Event to Watch (Next 1-2 Weeks)|
|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|
|**Oshkosh Corp** (NYSE:OSK)|9-month momentum & market cap size.|$132.00|$155.00|$124.00|Growth in defense segment contracts and electrification of municipal fleets.|**Infrastructure Bill Update:** Potential news regarding federal EV postal truck funding expected mid-May.|
|**Avnet, Inc.** (NASDAQ:AVT)|Strong 9-month price strength & size.|$79.50|$92.00|$74.00|Resilience in industrial and automotive chip distribution amid global supply stabilization.|**Sector Peer Earnings:** Watch **May 14–18** as other tech distributors report, which historically dictates AVT's short-term drift.|
|**Kaiser Aluminum** (NASDAQ:KALU)|Sustained positive momentum & fundamentals.|$175.00|$198.00|$166.00|Aerospace recovery and demand for high-strength alloys in commercial jet production.|**World Aluminium Summit:** Ongoing industry shifts discussed at the London summit (**May 12–14**) regarding scrap metal pricing.|
|**Shell plc** (NYSE:SHEL)|Macro momentum & stable growth.|$82.00|$94.00|$78.50|Massive share buyback program and optimization of LNG (Liquefied Natural Gas) assets.|**IEA Monthly Report:** The International Energy Agency's report on **May 14** will likely impact Shell’s price via global demand forecasts.|
|**Gold Fields Ltd** (NYSE:GFI)|Recent monthly price signals & size.|$42.50|$51.00|$39.80|Flight to safety and rising gold prices driven by global currency hedging.|**US CPI Data (May 13):** Gold stocks typically see high volatility immediately following the U.S. inflation data release.|
|**Phillips 66** (NYSE:PSX)|Momentum signals & size influence.|$168.00|$188.00|$161.00|High refining margins and strategic expansion into renewable diesel and NGLs.|**EIA Storage Data:** Weekly crude and product inventory reports on **May 13 & 20** will drive refinery stock volatility.|
|**Amcor plc** (NYSE:AMCR)|Momentum & moderate growth drivers.|$38.50|$44.00|$36.50|Shift toward sustainable, recyclable packaging solutions for global consumer staples.|**Ex-Dividend Date (May 21):** Expect a minor technical price adjustment on **May 21** as the stock goes ex-dividend.|

# Summary of risks:

* **Oshkosh (OSK):** Margin pressure from rising steel costs and **supply chain bottlenecks** impacting fire truck deliveries; watch a **board governance dispute** ahead of the 2026 annual meeting.
* **Avnet (AVT):** High risk of a **valuation trap** as the stock trades at a significant premium to its GF Value amid a maturing **semiconductor cycle**.
* **Kaiser Aluminum (KALU):** **Metal price volatility** and operational setbacks at the Warrick plant threaten high-margin aerospace production targets.

# Energy & Materials Risks

* **Shell (SHEL):** Recent **revenue miss** in Q1 2026 results due to demand variability and high exposure to **geopolitical uncertainty**.
* **Phillips 66 (PSX):** Facing a **$3 billion liquidity drain** after reporting a **$900 million mark-to-market loss** on derivatives linked to global conflicts.
* **Gold Fields (GFI):** Severe cost pressure if **oil remains above $100/barrel**; recently delayed a **$100 million share buyback** due to macro instability.
* **Amcor (AMCR):** Lowered free cash flow guidance to **$1.5–$1.6 billion** (down from $1.8–$1.9 billion) due to carrying **$200 million in extra inventory** for supply security.
